user.title: Lambda Heat Pump
user.description: Configure the connection to your Lambda heat pump control unit.

data_description.host: IPv4/IPv6 address or hostname of the Lambda heat pump control unit.
data_description.port: Modbus TCP port of the control unit (default: 502).
data_description.num_heatpumps: Number of configured heat pump modules (1–5).
data_description.num_heating_circuits: Number of configured heating circuit modules (0–12).
data_description.num_buffers: Number of configured buffer tank modules (0–5).
data_description.enable_ambient: Enable entities for the general ambient sensor module.
data_description.enable_emanager: Enable entities for the general E-Manager module.
data_description.scan_interval: How often to poll the heat pump for updated values (10–300 seconds).

reconfigure.title: Reconfigure Lambda Heat Pump
reconfigure.description: Update the connection settings for your Lambda heat pump.

data_description.host: IPv4/IPv6 address or hostname of the Lambda heat pump control unit.
data_description.port: Modbus TCP port of the control unit (default: 502).
data_description.num_heatpumps: Number of configured heat pump modules (1–5).
data_description.num_heating_circuits: Number of configured heating circuit modules (0–12).
data_description.num_buffers: Number of configured buffer tank modules (0–5).
data_description.enable_ambient: Enable entities for the general ambient sensor module.
data_description.enable_emanager: Enable entities for the general E-Manager module.
data_description.scan_interval: How often to poll the heat pump for updated values (10–300 seconds).

error.invalid_host: Invalid IP address or hostname. Please enter a valid IPv4/IPv6 address or hostname.
error.invalid_port: Invalid port. Please enter a value between 1 and 65535.
error.invalid_num_heatpumps: Invalid number of heat pumps. Please enter a value between 1 and 5.
error.invalid_num_heating_circuits: Invalid number of heating circuits. Please enter a value between 0 and 12.
error.invalid_num_boilers: Invalid number of boilers. Please enter a value between 0 and 5.
error.invalid_num_buffers: Invalid number of buffer tanks. Please enter a value between 0 and 5.
error.invalid_num_solar: Invalid number of solar modules. Please enter a value between 0 and 2.
error.invalid_scan_interval: Invalid polling interval. Please enter a value between 10 and 300 seconds.
error.cannot_connect: Cannot connect to the heat pump. Please check the IP address and port, and ensure the device is reachable.

abort.already_configured: This Lambda heat pump is already configured.

init.title: Lambda Heat Pump Options
init.description: Update the settings for your Lambda heat pump integration.

data_description.enable_emanager: Enable entities for the general E-Manager module.
data_description.scan_interval: How often to poll the heat pump for updated values (10–300 seconds).
